Vast coral throne room with bioluminescent star-ceiling, pearl-inlaid floors, and kelp tapestries swaying gently.
Underwater ballroom with crystal chandeliers refracting light, floating silk banners dancing in currents.
Pearl treasury vault overflowing with cascading jewels, golden artifacts, and chests of ancient coins.
Grand staircase of polished abalone descending into palace atrium, flanked by glowing sea-lanterns.
Royal garden cultivating rare coral species, sea anemones, and exotic luminescent deep-sea flowers.
Observatory dome of transparent crystal offering panoramic views of endless ocean depths beyond.
Council chamber with carved stone seats circling central speaking platform beneath vaulted ceiling.
Armory displaying ancient tridents, coral blades, and pearl-handled daggers on ornate racks.
Temple with towering coral columns supporting dome, altar draped in offerings to ocean goddess.
Royal bedchamber featuring silk-draped sleeping alcove beneath softly glowing bioluminescent ceiling mural.
Library hall with mother-of-pearl shelves holding waterproof scrolls and etched stone tablets.
Banquet hall with long table of carved whale bone, golden platters awaiting royal feast.
Nursery chamber painted with playful sea creatures, filled with floating toys and soft kelp bedding.
Spa grotto with heated volcanic springs, massage tables of smooth stone, fragrant oil vessels.
Portrait gallery displaying painted ancestors in ornate frames along marble-paneled corridor walls.
Map room with carved relief globe showing underwater kingdoms, shipping routes marked in jewels.
Musicians' alcove with shell instruments mounted on walls, cushioned seats for royal orchestra.
Prison cells behind thick iron bars set in volcanic stone, deep beneath palace foundations.
Meditation pool surrounded by singing crystal formations, natural acoustics amplifying peaceful sounds.
Ambassadors' receiving hall with diplomatic flags, comfortable seating areas, refreshment fountains flowing.
Queen's dressing chamber lined with mirrors, wardrobes of flowing gowns, jewelry cabinet overflowing.
Surgery with surgical tools, healing kelp supplies, patient beds for treating wounded warriors.
Smithy forge using volcanic vents, anvils of black iron, racks of unfinished weapons.
Astronomy tower with enchanted viewing pool reflecting celestial movements above ocean surface.
Crypts beneath palace holding royal sarcophagi in alcoves, eternal flames burning in sconces.
